nameMeanings.name: Paston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): habitational name, chiefly from Paston in Norfolk, probably derived from an Old English personal name Pæcci (genitive Pæcces) or Old English pæsc(e) (the source of northern English dialect pash ‘puddle’) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

English (West Midlands): sometimes a variant of Patstone, a habitational name chiefly from the lost Padston(e) in Bromsgrove (Worcestershire), and occasionally from Padson in Inwardleigh (Devon). The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Padda (genitive Paddes) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The etymology of the Devon placename is uncertain due to a lack of medieval forms, though an early spelling suggests the final element is Old English dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Paston was born in 1440, in Norfolk, England, her father, John Paston I, was 19 and her mother, Margaret Mautby, was 16. She married Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench about 1463. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Paston est née en 1440, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Paston I, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mautby, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench environ 1463. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Paston 1440 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Paston I 19 und ihre Mutter Margaret Mautby 16. Sie hat um 1463 Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Paston è nata il nel 1440 nel Norfolk, England, sua padre, John Paston I, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Margaret Mautby, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench circa 1463. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Pastonが1440年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父John Paston Iは19歳，母Margaret Mautbyは16歳であった。約1463年にSir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Benchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Paston(이)가 1440년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Paston I(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Mautby(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1463년 Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Paston nasceu em 1440, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Paston I, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mautby, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench aproximadamente 1463. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Paston родилась в 1440 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Paston I было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mautby, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench около 1463 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
